title: Creativerse
description: Survival and Creative mode dimensions in the same world!
body:
## What is Creativerse?

Creativerse is a data pack which generates a secondary overworld in your survival world - the creativerse!
This place is then used as a creative mode playground for
- prebuilding structures
- testing redstone machines
- experimenting with block palettes and gradients
- everything else you'd do in a creative world

Every player has separate inventories for both worlds!


## Play with friends regardless of playstyle

I created creativerse with the intention to unite my creative mode friends with my survival mode buddies on one server to hang out without interfering with each others playstyle.


## How to use

- /trigger creativerse_info gives you all the information you need
- /trigger creativerse_enter lets you enter the creativerse
- /trigger creativerse_exit returns you to the overworld
- /trigger creativerse_sync clones a 16x16x16 area from the overworld to the creativerse


## Experimental features, limitations and bugs

Please notice this data pack uses experimental features introduced in 1.16 which may or may not work in future versions of the game! Minecraft will warn you when you load a world which uses potentially unsafe features.

Since this was tested by only a handful of people bugs might occur. Make sure to always backup your world.

The creativerse only works in the overworld right now. There are no plans to make it work with nether and end at the moment.

If you encounter any bugs [message me on discord](http://www.discordapp.com/users/313768979976028162)!


## Usage alongside mods

creativerse is built as a data pack and exported as a mod. Because of this there may be issues with mods that change the inventory by adding new slots. Please backup your world if you plan to use creativerse alongside mods!
